name: instagram-mcp-server
description: Connect Claude to Instagram for profiles, posts, Business/Creator insights, search, messaging, and account actions
long_description:
# Instagram MCP Server

Connect Claude to your Instagram account with an MCP Bundle (MCPB, formerly DXT). The bundle starts quickly, downloads the Patchright Chromium browser in the background when needed, and opens Instagram login on the first auth-requiring tool call.

## First-time managed runtime flow

1. Install the `.mcpb` bundle in Claude Desktop.
2. Start Claude Desktop; the MCP server starts and begins preparing the Patchright Chromium browser cache under `~/.instagram-mcp/patchright-browsers`.
3. If you call a tool before setup finishes, the tool returns a setup-in-progress error.
4. On the first tool call that needs authentication, a browser window opens so you can sign into Instagram.
5. Retry the tool after login completes.

Docker remains available as a separate runtime path, but it still requires host-side `--login`.

tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: Get Instagram user profile with bio, followers, following, and posts count

tools.name: get_user_posts
tools.description: Get user's posts with engagement metrics

tools.name: get_user_reels
tools.description: Get user's reels with view counts and engagement

tools.name: get_user_stories
tools.description: Get user's active stories (if viewer has access)

tools.name: get_user_highlights
tools.description: Get user's story highlights

tools.name: get_business_insights
tools.description: Get Business/Creator account insights and analytics

tools.name: get_audience_insights
tools.description: Get audience demographics for Business/Creator accounts

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Search for Instagram users by username or name

tools.name: search_hashtags
tools.description: Search for hashtags and get post counts

tools.name: search_locations
tools.description: Search for locations and tagged posts

tools.name: get_post_details
tools.description: Get detailed post information including comments

tools.name: get_hashtag_posts
tools.description: Get posts for a specific hashtag

tools.name: get_location_posts
tools.description: Get posts tagged at a location

tools.name: get_direct_inbox
tools.description: List DM conversations from inbox

tools.name: get_dm_conversation
tools.description: Read a specific DM conversation

tools.name: send_dm
tools.description: Send a direct message to a user

tools.name: follow_user
tools.description: Follow a user (or send follow request for private accounts)

tools.name: unfollow_user
tools.description: Unfollow a user

tools.name: like_post
tools.description: Like a post

tools.name: unlike_post
tools.description: Unlike a post

tools.name: save_post
tools.description: Save a post to collections

tools.name: comment_on_post
tools.description: Post a comment on a post

tools.name: close_session
tools.description: Close browser session and cleanup
